india_trends.title: Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho delist Herbicide after CCPA notice
india_trends.summary: The platforms informed the regulator that listings of "Cyclosinone Herbicide" had been removed with immediate effect and that seller accounts associated with such listings had been placed under scrutiny, the regulator said in a statement on Saturday.

india_trends.title: Govt restricts silver imports amid push to curb metal inflows
india_trends.summary: India has introduced new rules for silver imports. Importers now need a government license. This policy aims to control the flow of precious metals and reduce the country's current account deficit. Earlier, customs duties on precious metals were also increased. These changes affect all silver import

india_trends.summary: New government restrictions target silver imports. The Centre is also tightening rules for duty-free gold imports by jewellery exporters. india_trends.title: Delhi cuts VAT on aviation turbine fuel to 7% from 25%
india_trends.summary: The Delhi government has significantly cut the Value Added Tax on Aviation Turbine Fuel. The tax on ATF will now be 7 percent, down from 25 percent. india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea posts ₹51,970 cr Q4 profit on AGR relief, promoter to infuse ₹4,730 cr
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea booked a net exceptional gain of ₹58,116 crore during the March quarter on the reduction of deferred AGR dues payment obligations.

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea Q4 Results: Co swings to black, posts profit of Rs 51,970 cr on one-time gain; revenue up 3% YoY
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Q4 Results: Vodafone Idea reported a net profit of Rs 51,970 crore for Q4 FY26, boosted by a one-time accounting gain from AGR reassessment. india_trends.title: Delhivery Q4 Results: Net profit flat at Rs 72.4 crore, revenue rises 30% YoY
india_trends.summary: Delhivery reported a marginal 0.2% year-on-year decline in net profit for Q4FY26 to Rs 72.4 crore, despite a 30% revenue jump to Rs 2,850 crore. The company saw significant growth in express parcel volumes and introduced AI-powered systems. For FY26, Delhivery turned free cash flow positive and achi

india_trends.title: Regulator in India's top solar state again blocks 3.2 GW coal power project
india_trends.summary: Rajasthan's power regulator has again rejected a proposed 3.2 gigawatt coal power project. The regulator wants state utilities to first reassess demand and capacity needs. This decision comes as other Indian states increase coal power purchases to meet rising demand for round-the-clock electricity.

india_trends.title: Housing sales dip 2% in January-March in top 8 cities to 96,000 units: PropTiger
india_trends.summary: Housing sales across eight major Indian cities saw a 2% dip in the first quarter of 2026. This decline was attributed to a slowdown in demand and a reduced supply of affordable homes. Bengaluru emerged as a standout performer with a significant sales increase.

india_trends.title: Athena opens northeast India’s largest integrated psychiatric hospital in Guwahati
